cards.name: Galadriel
cards.quote: Her gaze falls like starlight on still water, deep enough to unsettle the proud.

cards.name: Elrond
cards.quote: His counsel carries the weight of ages, and still it does not grow weary.

cards.name: Thranduil
cards.quote: The Elvenking wears pride like a crown of winter leaves, and the forest knows him.

cards.name: Cirdan
cards.quote: He has waited so long by the West that even the sea seems to listen.

cards.name: Bannerlords
cards.quote: Their banners ride before them like dawn over a forest ridge, bright with the memory of elf-lords.

cards.name: Elven Archers
cards.quote: Their shafts go out like whispers, and the woodland answers in silence.

cards.name: Elven Elk Riders
cards.quote: The elk run as if the earth itself had taken heart and chosen speed.

cards.name: Elven Fleet
cards.quote: Their keels cut the quiet water like moonlight drawn into a blade.

cards.name: Elvenking Guards
cards.quote: They stand where the trees grow oldest, and no lesser shadow passes unhindered.

cards.name: Galadhrim Archers
cards.quote: From the mallorn boughs their arrows fall like silver rain on the unwise.

cards.name: Half Elves
cards.quote: They belong to two histories, and carry the strength of both when the road grows dark.

cards.name: Hall Guards Of Thranduil
cards.quote: In the halls beneath the trees, their spears keep the hush unbroken.

cards.name: Noldo Cavalry
cards.quote: The Noldor ride as if exile were a spur and memory a banner.

cards.name: The Golden Host
cards.quote: Bright as a summons at dawn, they gather where a kingdom means to answer.

cards.name: Woodelf Archers
cards.quote: The forest teaches them patience, and patience is the deadliest bow.

cards.name: Woodelf Warriors
cards.quote: They fight with the rough grace of leaf and branch, and do not yield easily.

cards.name: Wood Elves
cards.quote: Older than many songs, they move as if the woodland were their first home.

cards.name: Elven Scouts
cards.quote: They read the path before the path is made, and vanish before the answer comes.

cards.name: Elven Warriors
cards.quote: They fight as the deep wood fights, with patience, grace, and sudden wrath.

cards.name: Caras Galadhon
cards.quote: In Caras Galadhon, the trees keep their own counsel, and none should presume to answer for them.

cards.name: Thanduil's Halls
cards.quote: The hush of Thanduil's Halls is deep as root and as old as the first road through the dark.

cards.name: Eregion
cards.quote: Eregion remembers the old craft, where silver hammers once sang beside the river.

cards.name: Lothlorien
cards.quote: Lothlorien keeps its grace like a sealed light, and gives it only to those it trusts.

cards.name: AmonLind
cards.quote: AmonLind gleams with the old patience of a watchman who has seen the dusk before.

cards.name: CarasAmarth
cards.quote: CarasAmarth watches from the black wood as if the trees themselves had been set to guard a secret.

cards.name: CeberFanuin
cards.quote: At CeberFanuin, the boughs bend low enough to listen, but not to forgive.

cards.name: Celebannon
cards.quote: At Celebannon, the boughs bend low enough to listen, but not to forgive.

cards.name: CerinAmroth
cards.quote: CerinAmroth lifts a green and golden hush above LÃ³rien, where even sorrow seems to keep its distance.

cards.name: Elostirion
cards.quote: Elostirion keeps its gaze westward, as if memory itself were a star.

cards.name: Forlond
cards.quote: Forlond faces the western sea with the old patience of the Eldar, and its shore is never idle.

cards.name: Harlond
cards.quote: Harlond stands by tide or river as if waiting for something that has not yet named itself.

cards.name: The Grey Havens
cards.quote: The Grey Havens look west with a sorrow that has long since learned grace.

cards.name: Rhubar
cards.quote: Rhubar lies beneath the weight of old kings, and the stones still know their names.

cards.name: NorthernMirkwood
cards.quote: North Mirkwood is a place where every shadow remembers a hunter.

cards.name: SouthernMirkwood
cards.quote: South Mirkwood is old with trails, fumes, and the patient watch of hidden things.

cards.name: Climbing the White Hills
cards.quote: From high stones, the world opens and the heart remembers hope.
cards.actionEffect: If played on hills or mountains, reveal the surrounding area in radius 2, and allied Hobbit and Elf units gain Hope <sprite name="hope"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Road to Rivendell
cards.quote: There are roads that remember the brave.
cards.actionEffect: Hobbits and Dwarves in radius 2 gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> and Haste <sprite name="haste">, and Fear <sprite name="fear"> and Halted <sprite name="halted"> are removed.

cards.name: Palantir Glimpse
cards.quote: Not all that is seen should be trusted, but even a perilous vision may tear the veil from what was hidden.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal 3 unseen hexes for 1 turn and gain Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Words of Warding
cards.quote: A single phrase, rightly spoken, may set a stronger wall than stone.
cards.actionEffect: One allied character in this hex gains Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> and Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: The Hidden Script
cards.quote: What was forgotten is not always lost; sometimes it merely waits for the right reader.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal 1 hidden artifact site and draw 1 card.

cards.name: Light Through Cloud
cards.quote: A clear thought and a clean light may scatter a whole host of lesser shadows.
cards.actionEffect: Remove Fear <sprite name="fear"> and Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> from enemy units in radius 1.

cards.name: Rune of the West
cards.quote: The mark itself is small; the memory behind it is not.
cards.actionEffect: One allied character in this hex gains Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> and Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Far-Speaking Thought
cards.quote: Mind may travel where foot cannot, and warning may arrive before the enemy does.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the hexes of up to 2 nearby enemy units and remove Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> from them.
